_comment: Models shown in the dashboard's model dropdown. Edit this list freely. Each entry is either a plain string (used verbatim as --model) or an object { label, value }. Bare names (e.g. gpt-4o) resolve as Azure OpenAI deployments; a 'copilot/' prefix routes through the GitHub Copilot API (requires COPILOT_TOKEN). 'default' is preselected.
